response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack and systems experience but lacks the core requirements for this role: there's no demonstrated depth in Java, Kotlin, JVM internals, or the Spring ecosystem, and no evidence of IDE/language-tooling work beyond a brief stint on a C IDE (LabWindows/CVI) over a decade ago. Primary expertise is in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — not the JVM stack this position demands.
strengths: Long track record across complex systems and large-scale codebases
Strong software craftsmanship habits (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
Prior IDE-adjacent experience at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI components in C/C++)
concerns: No demonstrated Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate or enterprise JVM framework experience
Java/Kotlin listed only as a skill with no recent substantive project work; Kotlin not mentioned at all
No evidence of JVM internals, language tooling, or modern IDE-platform development

key_factors.factor: No Kotlin and shallow Java background
